result:
If I could change the world in one way, I would give every person access to the highest quality education—tailored to their needs, language, and circumstances, and completely free.

Not just schooling, but the tools to think critically, to understand themselves and others, to imagine new possibilities, and to turn those possibilities into reality. Education is the multiplier: it lifts health outcomes, reduces poverty, strengthens democracies, fuels innovation, and makes people harder to manipulate. It doesn’t solve every problem directly, but it gives humanity its best shot at solving everything else.

What about you—if you had that same power, what would you change?

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
